journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_en: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_zh: 揭开生命礼物：新生儿性别宣布作为一种互动成就
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了人们如何通过互动方式宣布新生儿的性别，将其视为一种社会成就，而不是简单的信息传递。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how people announce the gender of newborns through interaction, treating it as a social achievement rather than just sharing information.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注社会互动中性别宣布的微观过程，探索沟通如何构建家庭和社会关系。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the micro-processes of gender announcements in social interaction, exploring how communication constructs family and social relationships.
